sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hashes (id UInt32, original_string String, hashed_value FixedString(32));
INSERT INTO test_hashes (id, original_string, hashed_value) VALUES (1, 'test', SHA256('test'));
UPDATE test_hashes SET hashed_value = SHA1(original_string) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, original_string, hex(SHA512(hashed_value)) as hex_hashed FROM test_hashes;
CREATE TABLE hash_logs AS SELECT id, original_string, hashed_value FROM test_hashes WHERE hashed_value IS NOT NULL;
